caption: A painting depicts a bright, sunlit scene with white buildings against a clear blue sky. A small white church with a bell tower and a red cross is visible on the left. In the foreground, a white domed structure and a stone wall are shown. A small red cross is mounted on the wall. The artist's signature, "John Miller," is in the lower right corner.

This is a painting depicting a densely built hillside settlement. The composition is dominated by layered, textured structures in earthy tones of brown, tan, and ochre, suggesting stone or adobe construction. A white building with a dark window is visible on the left, while a larger white structure with a dark arched opening sits atop the hill in the background. The foreground includes green and blue shapes, possibly foliage or water. The sky is rendered in muted grey and white, with visible brushstrokes throughout, giving the scene an impressionistic quality.

A sketch on yellowish paper shows a stylized, abstract figure riding a horse. The horse is drawn with a long neck, pointed ears, and a simple body. The rider is depicted with a large head, a long arm raised, and a body formed by curved lines. The figure appears to be on a bicycle, indicated by two large circles representing wheels connected by a frame. The drawing uses bold black lines and some brownish lines, with a textured tail on the horse.

A painting depicts a dark blue vase holding a cluster of white flowers. The flowers are rendered with textured, circular strokes, appearing dense and full. A green leaf or stem element is visible behind the flowers. The background is a mottled blend of beige, green, and blue, with visible brushstrokes and texture. The overall style is abstract and expressive, focusing on form and color rather than realistic detail.

A painting depicts a bouquet of flowers in a vase, rendered in soft, muted tones of pink, white, and beige. The flowers, possibly roses, are loosely formed with visible brushstrokes, creating a textured, impressionistic effect. The vase is a pale blue-gray, partially obscured by the blooms. The composition is centered within a square format, set against a textured, light brown background with a subtle, darker brown square framing the central subject. The overall style is painterly and abstract.

A close-up view of tree trunks in a forest. The trunks are slender and light-colored, with dark vertical markings. They stand against a background of dense, textured foliage in shades of green and yellow. The image has a painterly quality with visible brushstrokes, creating a soft, impressionistic effect. The lighting appears diffused, suggesting a shaded woodland environment.

A painting depicts a brown, woolly animal, possibly a sheep or goat, lying on a light-colored, flat surface. The animal is positioned horizontally, facing left, with its legs tucked beneath its body. A long, thin, dark object extends from its rear, casting a dark shadow across the surface. The background is a pale, off-white color with subtle variations in tone. The artwork has a textured appearance, suggesting a medium like pastel or soft brushwork. A signature is visible in the lower left corner.

A painting depicts a large, dark tree casting a prominent shadow over a white house with a red chimney. The house is situated on a bright yellow-green lawn under a cloudy sky with patches of blue. A small figure in light clothing sits on the grass in the lower right corner. The scene is rendered in a stylized, expressive manner with visible brushstrokes and bold contrasts between light and shadow.

A painting depicts a dramatic landscape with towering, textured rock formations in beige and ochre, set against a dark, stormy sky of deep blues and blacks. Below, a calm body of water reflects the sky and the base of the cliffs. In the lower left, a small, light-colored boat rests on the shore, while a few tiny, yellowish figures stand near the water's edge. The scene is rendered in a textured, expressive style with visible brushstrokes.

A snow-covered landscape features a horse pulling a sled with a person, moving across a field. Bare trees stand in the foreground, while buildings with snow-laden roofs are visible in the background under a pale sky. The scene is rendered in muted tones of white, beige, and brown, with a signature in the upper right corner.

A painting depicts a man with a beard and glasses, wearing a dark garment with white and yellow floral patterns. He is seated, holding a white object with similar floral designs. The background is dark and indistinct, with a blue square visible behind his head. The style is abstract and textured, with visible brushstrokes and layered colors.

This is a monochromatic portrait of an elderly man with voluminous, white, curly hair. He has a deeply lined face with prominent wrinkles, dark, sunken eyes, and a solemn expression. He wears a dark garment with a high, light-colored, ruffled collar that stands out against the dark background. The image has a grainy texture and a dramatic contrast between light and shadow, emphasizing the man's features and creating a somber, intense mood.
